name: Lard Cookies
recipeIngredient: 3 cups flour (or enough flour to make a soft dough which holds together for rolling)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the lard and let it cool until lukewarm.
2. Sift all dry ingredients together in a bowl.
3. Add the melted lard to the dry ingredients and mix well.
4. Gradually add buttermilk and stir until a soft dough forms.
5. Roll the dough out on a floured surface to a thickness of 1/2 inch.
6. Cut into large round cookies.
7. Bake for about 12 minutes, or until lightly browned.
